creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: mtm
Date: Wed Feb 11 09:18:09 2009
New Revision: 188478
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/188478

Log:
  Reword informational message by rc.d/defaultroute.
  
  PR:		conf/131458

Modified:
  head/etc/rc.d/defaultroute

Modified: head/etc/rc.d/defaultroute
==============================================================================
--- head/etc/rc.d/defaultroute	Wed Feb 11 07:50:07 2009	(r188477)
+++ head/etc/rc.d/defaultroute	Wed Feb 11 09:18:09 2009	(r188478)
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ defaultroute_start()
 			break
 		fi
 		if [ ${delay} -eq ${if_up_delay} ]; then
-			echo -n "Waiting ${delay}s for an interface to come up: "
+			echo -n "Waiting ${delay}s for the default route interface: "
 		else
 			echo -n .
 		fi
